title: The Depths of Impel Down: Turning Point
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Ivankov, Magellan, Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #7 as the scene develops across pages 14–17.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Ivankov, Magellan, Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: He'll be a great help to us,

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: It's been a while, croc boy...

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: Hey, why don't you release me too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I will definitely be of use!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ... I am forever in your debt!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: OHH!! I'm in your debt too!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Well then, we're short on time....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We've even got two former shichibukai here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Then why don't we settle this now?

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Ivankov, Magellan, Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of the depths of impel down: turning point.
